subject: Kyle Wagner - Federal Arrest for Anti-ICE Activism

charges.jurisdiction: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Michigan

significance: First major federal arrest of anti-ICE activist post-Operation Metro Surge; template for future activist targeting; charged under counterterrorism rhetoric
threat_assessment_for_similar_activists: EXTREME - demonstrates federal willingness to use cyberstalking/doxxing statutes against protest organizers; charged in Michigan (doxxing victim location) not Minnesota (activist location); HSI raid with heavy armament; 'terrorist' labeling by Trump officials
